summary: Enterprise financial management for accounting, procurement, billing, and asset management—with the accuracy, compliance, and visibility finance teams need at scale. Aligns with Unit4 Financials / Coda positioning on unit4.com.

data.headline: Unit4 Financials — enterprise financial management
data.subheadline: Record-to-report, procurement, billing, and assets with control and compliance.

children.text: Unit4 Financials by Coda helps organizations run a full financial management stack—general ledger, payables and receivables, procurement, billing, fixed assets, and more—with workflows that match how people-centric services organizations operate. Pair it with Unit4 ERP and FP&A for an end-to-end view from operations to consolidated reporting.

create.title: Financial control built for complex organizations
create.subtitle: Themes consistent with Unit4 ERP financial management content.

children.text: Consolidate financial data for a comprehensive view—adjust quickly to internal or external change while empowering teams to focus on strategic work.
Standardize purchasing, improve supplier relationships, and reduce maverick spending with processes that connect finance and operations.
Tight integration with Unit4 FP&A supports forecasting, consolidation, and scenario planning from the same trusted data model.
